farmerName.description: Full name of the farmer or agribusiness name. Used to personalize results and cross-reference documents.

stateOfResidence.description: Nigerian state where the farmer operates (e.g., 'Kano', 'Ogun', 'Benue', 'Rivers', 'FCT'). Used to match state-specific and geographically targeted grants.

lga.description: Optional: Local Government Area within the state. Helps identify hyper-local or LGA-targeted programs. Omit if unknown.

farmType.description: Primary type of farming or agribusiness operation. Allowed values: 'crop', 'livestock', 'poultry', 'fishery/aquaculture', 'mixed', 'horticulture', 'agro-processing', 'cooperative', 'agribusiness', 'other'.

cropOrLivestockTypes.description: List of specific crops grown or livestock/fish raised (e.g., ['cassava', 'maize', 'rice'] or ['cattle', 'poultry', 'catfish']). Used to match commodity-specific programs like CBN Anchor Borrowers or NIRSAL value chain schemes.

farmSizeHectares.description: Total farm area in hectares. Used to classify as smallholder (under 5 ha) or medium/large scale, which affects eligibility for most Nigerian grant schemes.

annualRevenueNGN.description: Approximate annual farm revenue in Nigerian Naira (NGN). Used for income-based eligibility thresholds in BOA, NIRSAL, and microfinance-linked programs.

farmingExperienceYears.description: Number of years the farmer has been actively farming. Used to determine eligibility for youth agripreneurship programs (typically under 35 years old and under 5 years farming).

isSmallholderFarmer.description: True if the farmer is a smallholder (typically farms under 5 hectares). Enables matching with NIRSAL, CBN Anchor Borrowers, IFAD, and FAO smallholder-specific programs.

isYouthFarmer.description: True if the farmer is aged 18–35. Enables matching with NASC, Youth in Agriculture programs, Agric-YES, and international youth-focused grants.

isWomanFarmer.description: True if the farmer is a woman or the farm is woman-led. Enables matching with IFAD women programs, GIZ She Feeds the World, and state women-in-agric initiatives.

hasCACRegistration.description: True if the farmer has a registered business or cooperative with the Corporate Affairs Commission (CAC). Many federal and international grants require formal registration.

hasLandDocument.description: True if the farmer has a formal land document (C of O, R of O, or Survey Plan). Required for most BOA loan-linked grants and land-improvement programs.

isMemberOfCooperative.description: True if the farmer is a registered member of a cooperative society. Cooperative membership is often required for CBN Anchor Borrowers Programme and group-based schemes.

fundingPurpose.description: What the farmer needs funding for (e.g., 'irrigation infrastructure', 'farm inputs and seeds', 'processing equipment', 'storage/silo construction', 'land clearing', 'market linkage', 'value chain development', 'livestock vaccination', 'fish pond construction'). This is the primary driver of grant matching.

additionalNotes.description: Optional: Any extra context (e.g., 'already applied for Anchor Borrowers', 'operates in conflict-affected area', 'has existing CBN loan', 'part of a cluster farm'). Omit if not applicable.

farmerName.description: Full name of the farmer or agribusiness as provided in input, echoed for report identification.

stateOfResidence.description: Nigerian state of the farmer, echoed from input.

totalMatchesFound.description: Total number of FREE grant opportunities matched to the farmer's profile. Only count grants that require zero repayment.

matchedGrants.description: Ranked list of matched FREE grant opportunities sorted by matchScore descending. Every entry must be a free grant — no loans, no credit facilities, no repayment-based programs.

grantName.description: Official name of the FREE grant program. Must be a grant — never a loan.

grantingOrganization.description: Full name of the organization providing the FREE grant.

fundingBody.description: Specific body or programme window providing the free grant.

description.description: 2 to 3 sentence description of what the FREE grant funds, its objectives, and target beneficiaries.

fundingAmountRange.description: Estimated FREE grant funding range in NGN or USD.

currency.description: Primary currency of the grant disbursement.

matchScore.description: Match score 0 to 100 indicating how well the FREE grant fits this farmer's profile.

matchReason.description: Specific explanation of why this FREE grant matches the farmer.

eligibilityCriteria.description: Key eligibility requirements the farmer must meet for this FREE grant.

requiredDocuments.description: List of key documents typically required to apply for this grant.

applicationProcess.description: Brief description of how to apply for this FREE grant.

applicationUrl.description: Official URL for the grant page, portal, or organization homepage.

profileGaps.description: Specific profile gaps or missing registrations limiting the farmer's access to FREE grants.

topRecommendation.description: The single best FREE grant opportunity for this farmer based on their profile.

summary.description: 3 to 5 sentence professional summary covering: total FREE grants found, the most relevant programs, the farmer's strongest eligibility angle, and recommended immediate next steps.

submissionMethod.description: The recommended method for submitting the application for the top recommended grant.

currentStatus.description: The current status of the application. Must be 'not-yet-submitted' at this discovery stage.

documentsChecklist.description: A list of required documents for the top recommended grant. Must be an array of strings.

agentAction.description: The action the downstream agent should take. Usually 'prepare-submission-package'.
